description_long: This is a round chocolate cake generously coated with a glossy chocolate ganache. The top is decorated with a mix of fresh raspberries and small yellow fruit pieces, likely mango or peach, arranged in a scattered pattern. The cake's surface appears slightly uneven, with the fruits partially embedded in the ganache, giving it a rustic, homemade look. There is a light dusting of powdered sugar or similar white topping sprinkled over the fruits. The cake is single-tiered and does not feature any candles or elaborate decorations. It is displayed without any visible plate, tray, or stand, resting directly on a flat surface.
description: A round chocolate cake topped with glossy ganache, fresh raspberries, and yellow fruit pieces, finished with a dusting of white powder. The cake has a rustic, homemade appearance and is displayed without a container.
description_view_0: The cake's top is clearly visible, showing a dense cluster of raspberries and yellow fruit pieces on a shiny chocolate surface.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the glossy ganache and the distribution of fruit, with more yellow fruit pieces visible in the foreground.
description_view_2: The side of the cake is more prominent, with the fruit decorations appearing slightly more spread out and the chocolate coating visible along the edge.
description_view_3: The fruit decorations are seen from a higher angle, with the powdered sugar dusting more apparent and the cake's edge less defined.
